scripts.lighthouse:mobile: node -e "require('fs').mkdirSync('lhci',{recursive:true})" && start-server-and-test "npm run build && npm run start" http://localhost:3000 "lighthouse http://localhost:3000 --form-factor=mobile --screenEmulation.mobile=true --throttling-method=simulate --output=html --output-path=./lhci/lighthouse-mobile.html --no-enable-error-reporting"
scripts.lighthouse:desktop: node -e "require('fs').mkdirSync('lhci',{recursive:true})" && start-server-and-test "npm run build && npm run start" http://localhost:3000 "lighthouse http://localhost:3000 --preset=desktop --form-factor=desktop --screenEmulation.disabled=true --throttling-method=simulate --output=html --output-path=./lhci/lighthouse-desktop.html --no-enable-error-reporting"
